message:
fix: Complete containsAwait AST traversal in async_state_machine.zig

Long-term fix: Made containsAwait comprehensive for all expression
and statement types where await can appear.

Added handling for:
- All expression types (call, binop, subscript, if_expr, etc.)
- Comprehensions (listcomp, dictcomp, genexp)
- fstring, lambda, starred
- All control flow statements (if, for, while, try, with)
- keyword_args in calls, subscript slice ranges

This ensures proper async state machine generation when await
appears in complex expressions or nested statements.
